signals.headline: Luka Doncic Unlikely to Return in First Round; Austin Reaves Possible Later | NO (for immediate return) | HIGH confidenc
signals.raw:
Luka Doncic Unlikely to Return in First Round; Austin Reaves Possible Later | NO (for immediate return) | HIGH confidence**  
Shams Charania confirmed the Lakers do not expect Luka Doncic (Grade 2 hamstring strain) back during the first round vs. Houston, requiring a second-round advancement, while Austin Reaves (oblique) could return sometime in the first round per JJ Redick and reports.[2][3]

signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Trump's indefinite extension of the Iran ceasefire on April 22, 2026, has driven Bitcoin to $77,541 (+2.2% daily, +4.3% weekly) by removing geopolitical risk premiums like the Strait of Hormuz shock, enabling BTC breakout above $76,000 and broader risk-on rotation.[1][4]  
Ethereum rose 0.7% to $2,390 on April 22, tracking BTC a

signals.headline: Lakers Take 2-0 Series Lead Over Rockets in Game 2 Despite Kevin Durant's Return | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Lakers Take 2-0 Series Lead Over Rockets in Game 2 Despite Kevin Durant's Return | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Los Angeles Lakers defeated the Houston Rockets 101-94 in Game 2 of their first-round playoff series on April 21, 2026, securing a commanding 2-0 lead, with LeBron James scoring 28 points and Marcus Smart making playoff history despite Durant's availability after a knee injury.[1][2][3]
